description: Companion Mode — 附近人约伴与多行程。Phase 1: 多行程(纯本地,零社交,零隐私风险). Phase 1 implements Itinerary data model, Swift persistence, UI, and outbox sync. Source: tasks/prd-companion-mode.md

userStories.title: Define Itinerary data model (TS core)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a typed Itinerary schema in core so itineraries can be passed consistently across all three layers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/core/src/companion.ts exporting Itinerary, ItineraryId (branded type)
Follow project conventions: date is ISO day granularity, timestamps are ISO 8601 UTC

userStories.title: Itinerary Swift model + parity passes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Itinerary.swift mirroring TS so the parity guard passes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/ios/SoloCompass/Models/Itinerary.swift with fields aligned to TS
ItineraryId uses strong Swift type (struct wrapper or typealias + validation)

userStories.title: Itinerary local persistence (SwiftData)
userStories.description: As a user, I want my itineraries persisted locally so they survive app restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: SwiftData model + ItineraryStore for CRUD operations
Unit tests covering CRUD in apps/ios/SoloCompass/Tests/

userStories.title: Itinerary list and detail UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my itineraries and enter one to manage the travel plan.
acceptanceCriteria: List shows title / city / date range / experience count

userStories.title: Create / edit itinerary form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create an itinerary with title/city/dates so I can start planning.
acceptanceCriteria: Create form: title, cityCode (from existing city picker), startDate, endDate
endDate must not be before startDate (form validation)
Saved itinerary immediately appears in the list

userStories.title: Add experiences to itinerary / migrate from favorites
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add an Experience to an itinerary and migrate existing favorites into itineraries.
acceptanceCriteria: Experience detail view has 'Add to itinerary' entry point

userStories.title: Sync itineraries via outbox to Supabase
userStories.description: As a user, I want itineraries synced across devices so I don't lose them when switching devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse SyncService.enqueue outbox pattern with new itinerary sync handler
FF_COMPANION flag off: only record to outbox, don't flush
